- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Go the automation workflow up and running where our Agentic workflow
  Monitors keywords with Buyer’s intent using DataForSEO
  Weekly pulls the performance of Agroverse.shop via Google Search Console APi to see how the site is ranking

  NEed to figure out how to delegate updating of content on Agroverse.shop to our Agentic workflow while still keeping humans in the loop but with low effort
  
  Codebase changes
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/53
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/24
